name: Ibotta, Inc.
business: Ibotta operates the Ibotta Performance Network, a digital promotions platform. It sources promotions from consumer packaged goods brands and distributes them through its own direct-to-consumer properties and third-party publisher partners. Revenue is generated per redemption.

exposures.sentence: We use AI/ML tools as part of our technology platform, and we continue to evaluate additional opportunities for applications of these tools as our platform evolves and as new AI/ML tools become available.

We are making substantial investments to capitalize on new and unproven business opportunities, including investment in AI/ML tools and technologies, and expect to increase such investments in the future.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. consumers have historically spent over $1 trillion in the grocery sector each year, and CPG brands spend approximately a combined $200 billion on marketing and trade promotions annually in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: U.S. consumers have historically spent over $1 trillion in the grocery sector each year, and CPG brands compete fiercely to influence their spending habits, spending approximately a combined $200 billion on marketing and trade promotions annually in the U.S.
